name: RTL app shell
guidance: Place navigation and hierarchy according to RTL reading flow; verify drawer direction and active states.

name: Persian legal tone
guidance: Use precise, respectful, formal copy; avoid playful SaaS phrases.

name: Jalali date display
guidance: Use Jalali dates when expected; keep Gregorian only when product context requires it.

name: Toman/Rial clarity
guidance: Choose Toman or Rial explicitly and keep formatting consistent.

name: Mixed LTR isolation
guidance: Isolate emails, URLs, ticket IDs, and code snippets to prevent bidi confusion.

name: Persian typography scale
guidance: Use Persian-capable fonts, avoid negative tracking, and test at small UI sizes.

name: RTL table actions
guidance: Align text and row actions to match RTL scanning; keep numeric comparison readable.

name: Directional icon mirroring
guidance: Mirror spatial arrows; never mirror brand or semantic icons.

name: Luxury legal palette
guidance: Use navy/charcoal/ivory with restrained gold accents for authority.

name: Persian form flow
guidance: Align labels, help, errors, and icons for RTL; isolate numeric fields when needed.

name: Admin live preview RTL
guidance: Show RTL live preview for public-facing Persian content before save.

name: Persian empty states
guidance: Use concise recovery-oriented Persian copy; avoid blame and vague messages.
